---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: "bug"
assignees: ""
---

**Bug Type**
Please check the type of bug:

- [ ] **Hard crash** (compilation fails due to a panic)
- [ ] **Logic error** (computed values are not correct)
- [ ] **Visual error** (layout bugs)

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Code to Reproduce**
Please provide the minimal typst code snippet required to reproduce the bug.

```typst
// Write your code here

```

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
